steps.title: Identify standard form of a linear function
steps.content:
The function is given as $$f(x) = 5x + 17$$, which matches the standard linear form $$f(x) = mx + b$$. In this form, b directly represents the y-intercept.

Here, $$b = 17$$.

steps.title: Conclude y-intercept value
steps.content:
Since the y-intercept is the value of $$f(0)$$, and the constant term $$b$$ in the equation already gives this value, the y-coordinate of the y-intercept is $$17$$.
The answer is 17.
